the_breathing_set: Inhale the silence, exhale the sound / Breathing the logic we finally found
Duck the low, let the kick take control / Pumping the signal through every soul
Rhythm is breathing, the machine is alive / Only the strongest frequencies survive
the_pulse_set: Heartbeat of neon, heartbeat of lead / Waking the rhythms that never were dead
Zero to one, the compression is tight / Pulsing forever in the digital night
Sidechain reactor, fusion is near / Erasing the noise, erasing the fear
the_pumping_dialogue: Give way to the hit / Move with the beat
The logic is lit / The circle's complete

psychoacoustic_pumping_v4.the_suction_effect: Applying -6dB gain reduction to the master-bus reverb during kick-hits
psychoacoustic_pumping_v4.low_end_purity: Sidechaining the low-shelf of the pads to the sub-bass (52Hz fundamental)
psychoacoustic_pumping_v4.transient_recovery: Using 'soft-knee' on the snare-sidechain to avoid 'clicky' artifacts
